name: My Skyline Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown ground beef in a skillet with onions until fully cooked.
2. Drain any excess fat from the pan.
3. Place the peppercorns, bay leaves, red peppers, and garlic cloves in a spice bag.
4. In a large pot, combine the remaining ingredients (tomato paste, water, chili powder,
ground red pepper, vinegar, cinnamon, allspice, Worcestershire sauce, and salt).
5. Cook over low heat for 3-4 hours, stirring occasionally.
6. Remove the spice bag and whole garlic cloves before serving.
7. Serve hot over cooked pasta, topped with shredded Colby cheese and additional chopped onions if desired.
